name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy for Codex — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, and in-app feedback. Bundles the shipeasy MCP server plus the same 10 skills the Claude Code plugin ships (9 area guides + the shipeasy-ops-work workflow loop); no content is duplicated. All CRUD is delegated to the shipeasy MCP server or CLI — invoke the plugin with @shipeasy or let a skill trigger on phrasing.

interface.shortDescription: Feature flags, A/B experiments, metrics, translations, and in-app feedback.
